message:
audit: batch 482 — 11 high-danger files (~13,735L) all SOUND

Targeted the least-audited, most-dangerous files by pattern density:
- reactor/macos.rs (28 unsafe): all FFI verified, 1 MEDIUM noted (32-bit WAKE_TOKEN)
- reactor/kqueue.rs (19 unsafe): fd reuse protection, bookkeeping correct
- bulkhead.rs (55 unwrap): all in tests, permit RAII correct
- typed_symbol.rs (34 unwrap): all in tests, header encoding correct
- tls/acceptor.rs (73 unwrap): all in tests, TLS handshake sound
- grpc/web.rs (33 unwrap + 6 panic): all in tests, trailer encoding sound
- reactor/token.rs (19 casts): generation ABA correct on both platforms
- intrusive_heap.rs (13 unwrap): textbook heap, stale index healing
- trace/integrity.rs (49 unwrap): all in tests, allocation guards
- lyapunov.rs, graded.rs: manual audits, both sound

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -205,7 +205,6 @@ output.txt
 /run_*.rs
 
 # Standalone bug reproduction / debugging harnesses
-src/channel/deadlock_test.rs
 **/*_test_bug.rs
 tests/buffer_lost_wakeup.rs
